meaning: n.苏(越南的辅币单位,相当于1/100盾)
examples: Xu has learned English all by himself.
Xu Yuanchong is a famous Chinese modern translator.
Why is Xu Wei proud of China?
Guo is one of three rotating CEOs, the others are Eric Xu and Ken Hu.
Ever the pragmatist, Ms. Xu is keenly aware of risks in the content business in China.
